subject: mitch
body:
We need to deal with the no precedent and how the facts don't fit the law,,, arguing why they shouldn't move forward as a matter of federal interest, is much harder,, it is balanced by high- profile,, why not.. they don't want to lose however... and that is where I;d like to to focus the next memo.

----- Original Message ----
From: Alan M. Dershowitz <dersh@law.harvard.edu>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com; dersh@law.harvard.edu; avid@mycingular.blackberry.net
Sent: Sunday, October 22, 2006 4:50:38 PM
Subject: Eiger/Webber memo


Mr. Epstein,

Here's the memo in Microsoft Word.

Best,
Mitch
